_comment: Mechanics are markdown files with YAML frontmatter, not JSON. This file shows the required frontmatter fields. Create mechanics in mechanics/<id>.md
frontmatter_template:
---
id: my-mechanic
tags: [tag1, tag2]
related: [other-mechanic-id, status-effect-id]
---
body: Freeform markdown. Describe the system, rules, edge cases, and design intent. Claude will read this as prose context.
tips: Keep each mechanic to one focused system
Use 'related' to cross-reference other entries in the catalog
Code examples and pseudocode are fine in the markdown body
